pi_items.source: Task description line: 'accept EAN-13 barcodes starting with the prefix 24'

Task description specifies: Prefix '24', followed by 5 digits for Product Code, followed by 5 digits for Weight (2 integer, 3 decimal). Example barcode '245500101500x' validates this pattern. Verifier expects this exact format with 5 dots and {NNDDD} suffix.
Task description line: 'Barcode (Product Code part): 55001'. Example barcode '245500101500x' confirms position 3-7 is '55001'.
Task description line: 'Create a test product named Prosciutto di Parma'
Task description line: 'Unit of Measure: kg'

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Odoo to recognize weight-embedded EAN-13 barcodes with prefix '24' using pattern '24.....{NNDDD}' (prefix + 5-digit product code + 5-digit weight with 2 integer and 3 decimal digits). A test product 'Prosciutto di Parma' is created with barcode '55001' and unit of measure 'kg'. Example barcode '245500101500x' parses as 1.500 kg. All values are synthetic test data derived from the task description.
